ls -la .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && cat .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | jq . && echo "---" && ls .wheel/pending.json 2>/dev/null; echo "pending exists: $?"
for f in .wheel/state_*.json; do echo "=== $(basename $f) ==="; jq '{cursor: .cursor, status: .status, steps: [.steps[] | {id: .id, status: .status}]}' "$f"; done
